title: Polar Gear Kids Water Bottles with Straw - 400ml BPA-Free Kids Drinks Bottle with Carry Handle - School Water Bottle with Removable Straw - Construction, Red
features: Fun Designs & Perfect Size (400ml) : With a fun construction design and a 400ml capacity, this boys water bottle for school is just the right size to keep your child hydrated throughout the day without being too bulky for their backpack.

Removable Straw : Our Polar Gear water bottle has a removable straw which makes cleaning effortless, ensuring optimal hygiene in your kids water bottle with straw. This feature also adds versatility, allowing your child to sip or drink directly from the childrens water bottle, catering to their personal preference.

Leakproof Toddler Bottle : Designed with a secure seal, these kids water bottles leakproof design ensures you can confidently pack them in school bags without worrying about spills or messes. Please ensure the nozzle is pressed all the way down when not in use to ensure there are no spills.

Impact Resistant and Fully Recyclable Kids Bottle : Built to last with impact-resistant SK Ecozen bio-copolyester – made from plants, this water bottle for kids withstands the rough and tumble of everyday use.

Convenient Carry Handle: These water bottles for school have a built-in carry handle which makes it easy for little hands to grab and go, encouraging independence and making it a perfect companion for school, trips, and outdoor adventures.

Wide Mouth, Easy to Refill School Bottle : The wide mouth design of our Polar Gear water bottle for kids allows for quick and hassle-free refills, making it easy to add ice cubes or your child's favourite fruits for extra flavour. Perfect for busy parents and kids on the go.

BPA Free Drink Bottles For Children : Made from BPA-free materials, this kids school water bottle ensures your child's drink remains safe and free from harmful chemicals, giving you peace of mind with every sip.
Not suitable for hot or carbonated drinks. Rinse & dry before use. Hand wash only. Not suitable for children under 36 months as small parts may present a choking hazard.
